title: Kubernetes | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# Kubernetes/Helm

## [Language-specific properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/kubernetes/#language-specific-properties "Language-specific properties")

Discover and update Kubernetes-specific [properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/analysis-parameters/ "properties") in Project **Administration** > **General Settings** > **Languages** > **Kubernetes.**

All the [rules](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/digging-deeper/rules/ "rules") that apply to Kubernetes files also apply to Helm Chart files.
